Notes: Areas 1, 2, 142, and west portion of Area 101: 1 Chinook per day effective May 29 to July 31. Areas 3 to 5, 103 to 105, sub-area 102-1, and east portion of 101: 1 Chinook per day effective June 1 to June 22, and 0 Chinook per day effective June 23 until further notice. Tidal portion of Gingolx (Kincolith) River: 0 Chinook per day effective June 23 until further notice.
The daily limit for sockeye is four (4) per day in the tidal waters of Areas 3, 4, and 5
Gill nets open 05:00 to 22:00 hours on July 10 - 11. Retention of sockeye and pink salmon.
